passage_text: The local community library will be hosting a week-long program to encourage reading among residents. Starting next Monday, the library will open its doors for extended hours from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Special events will include storytelling sessions for children, workshops on digital literacy, and author meet-and-greet sessions. Residents are encouraged to register online in advance for workshops as spaces are limited. The library also plans to introduce a new collection of fiction and non-fiction books, as well as e-books that can be borrowed remotely. Participants are asked to follow the library's safety rules, including wearing masks and sanitizing hands regularly. The library hopes this initiative will inspire more people to read, improve digital skills, and strengthen community engagement.
text: Fill in the blank: Participants must follow the library's safety rules
